events.title: Arrived at Departure Airport
events.description: Shipment is at the airport awaiting departure to the destination country.

events.title: Departed on Flight
events.description: Shipment has departed on an international flight.

events.title: Arrived at Transit Hub
events.description: Shipment has arrived at an intermediate transit hub.

events.title: Departed Transit Hub
events.description: Shipment has departed the intermediate transit hub.

events.title: Connecting Flight Departed
events.description: Shipment is on the final flight to the destination country.

events.title: Electronic Shipping Info Received
events.description: The shipper has generated a shipment label, but the shipment has not yet been handed over to the carrier.

events.title: Shipment Picked Up
events.description: The carrier has picked up the shipment from the shipper.

events.title: Processed at Origin Hub
events.description: Shipment has been processed and sorted at the origin processing facility.

events.title: Departed Origin Hub
events.description: Shipment has left the origin facility and is in transit to the export gateway.

events.title: Arrived at Export Gateway
events.description: Shipment has arrived at the international export facility.

events.title: Customs Clearance Started
events.description: Shipment has been submitted to export customs for review.

events.title: Export Customs Cleared
events.description: Customs clearance is complete. Shipment is ready for international departure.

events.title: Arrived at Departure Airport
events.description: Shipment is at the airport awaiting departure to the destination country.

events.title: Departed on Flight
events.description: Shipment has departed on an international flight.

events.title: Arrived at Transit Hub
events.description: Shipment has arrived at an intermediate transit hub.

events.title: Departed Transit Hub
events.description: Shipment has departed the intermediate transit hub.

events.title: Connecting Flight Departed
events.description: Shipment is on the final flight to the destination country.

events.title: Arrived at Destination Airport
events.description: Shipment has touched down in the destination country.

events.title: Submitted to Import Customs
events.description: Shipment has been handed over to destination customs for processing.

events.title: Customs Processing
events.description: Shipment is undergoing routine customs inspection.

events.title: Import Customs Cleared
events.description: Shipment has been released by customs and handed to the local carrier.

events.title: Arrived at Germany Hub
events.description: Shipment has arrived at the primary sorting facility in Germany.

events.title: Processed at Regional Facility
events.description: Shipment sorted at regional processing center serving Australia.

events.title: Arrived at Local Facility
events.description: Shipment has arrived at the final delivery depot.

events.title: Out for Delivery
events.description: Shipment has been loaded onto the delivery vehicle.

events.title: Delivered
events.description: Shipment has been successfully delivered to the recipient.
